title: On load, the transactions list shows at least 8 seeded rows with payee, category, and amount visible
After creating a transaction with payee 'Ada Books' and a valid amount, the text 'Ada Books' is visible in the transactions list
After adding 3 new transactions on top of the seed set, the list shows exactly 3 more rows than the initial seeded count
After creating an expense transaction, Total Expenses (or Net) KPI updates to reflect the new amount
After editing a payee from the seeded value to 'Evening Market', the text 'Evening Market' is visible and the previous payee is not
After deleting a transaction, that payee is no longer visible in the transactions list
After deleting all transactions, an empty state message is visible and no transaction rows remain
After submitting create with an empty required payee or amount, the transactions count does not increase and validation feedback is visible
After filtering transactions by a category (with mixed categories present), only matching rows remain visible
After switching between Breakdown and Trends chart tabs, the chart panel swaps without full page navigation
After focusing the transactions list versus the chart panel (list vs chart interaction modes), both remain usable without leaving the page
When hovering sidebar items, transaction rows, or primary buttons, a visible hover wash or shadow change appears
After selecting multiple transaction rows and running bulk categorize or bulk delete, the selected rows update category together or disappear from the list and KPIs/charts reflect the change
